notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Francisco Lindor.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Lindor doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Francisco Alvarez scores. Francisco Lindor to 3rd. Throwing error by right fielder Corbin Carroll.
